Title: User Login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the valid username.
3. Enter the valid password.
4. Click the login button.

Title: User Login with Invalid Credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the invalid username.
3. Enter the invalid password.
4. Click the login button.
Expected Result: Login fails, and an error message is displayed.

Title: Admin Login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the admin login page.
2. Enter the valid username.
3. Enter the valid password.
4. Click the login button.

Title: Admin Login with Invalid Credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the admin login page.
2. Enter the invalid username.
3. Enter the invalid password.
4. Click the login button.
Expected Result: Login fails, and an error message is displayed.

Title: Admin Add Product
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the admin dashboard.
2. Click the "Add Product" button.
3. Enter the product name.
4. Enter the product description.
5. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The product is successfully added to the system.

Title: Admin Remove Product
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the admin dashboard.
2. Find the product to be removed.
3. Click the "Remove" button next to the product.
Expected Result: The product is successfully removed from the system.

Title: Add Item to Cart
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product page.
2. Click the "Add to Cart" button.
3. Enter the quantity.
4. Click the "Add" button.
Expected Result: The item is successfully added to the cart.

Title: Remove Item from Cart
Preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the cart.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the cart page.
2. Find the item to be removed.
3. Click the "Remove" button next to the item.
Expected Result: The item is successfully removed from the cart.

Title: Checkout with Invalid Payment Information
Preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the cart.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the cart page.
2. Click the "Checkout" button.
3. Enter the invalid payment information.
4. Click the "Place Order" button.
Expected Result: The order cannot be placed, and an error message is displayed.
